intent: Write a focused comparison of mid-tier gaming peripherals (keyboard versus mouse versus headset) for a $120 single-upgrade decision. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the video-games and electronics categories and collect at least 3 distinct peripheral types with 1-2 candidate products per type (so 4-6 total). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/gaming AND /f/technology for posts on which peripheral upgrade brings the biggest subjective improvement, or which category is most over-hyped. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) present each candidate product with its stats, (b) pull at least two community arguments that frame the 'best bang for buck' peripheral category, (c) commit to ONE recommendation for the $120 upgrade, justifying against the other two categories. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Single-decision tradeoff between 3 peripheral classes. Forces commitment to ONE answer.
